title: Xerotes obliqua
taxonomy: Xerotes obliqua is classified under the family Marantaceae and the order Zingiberales. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the division Magnoliophyta. Further classification of Xerotes obliqua includes the class Liliopsida and the order Zingiberales. The genus Xerotes is a part of the family Marantaceae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
